steps.title: Set up the unit conversion
steps.content:
To convert 112 furlongs to feet, apply both conversion factors in sequence. Since 1 furlong = 220 yards and 1 yard = 3 feet, the calculation is:
$$112 \times 220 \times 3$$

steps.title: Combine conversion factors and multiply
steps.content:
First, multiply the two conversion factors: $220 \times 3 = 660$ feet per furlong.

Then multiply by the initial distance:
$$112 \times 660 = 73,920 \text{ feet}$$
